feed.title: Petr's Blog
feed.subtitle: Blogging about DevOps, Kubernetes, RPi, tips, ...

entry.title: Slack bot for answering questions from Confluence using Amazon Bedrock

link.title: Slack bot for answering questions from Confluence using Amazon Bedrock

entry.summary: Slack bot that answers questions from your Confluence wiki using Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Base, OpenSearch Serverless, and LiteLLM on Amazon EKS, with Arize Phoenix tracing, provisioned with OpenTofu.

entry.title: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Slack Bot deployed with OpenTofu

link.title: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Slack Bot deployed with OpenTofu

entry.summary: Deploy a Slack bot powered by Amazon Bedrock AgentCore with Context7 MCP tools using OpenTofu

entry.title: Amazon EKS with Open WebUI and AWS Bedrock managed by OpenTofu

link.title: Amazon EKS with Open WebUI and AWS Bedrock managed by OpenTofu

entry.summary: Deploy Open WebUI on Amazon EKS with AWS Bedrock as the LLM backend, provisioned with OpenTofu

entry.title: Amazon EKS with Envoy Gateway deployed using Argo CD

link.title: Amazon EKS with Envoy Gateway deployed using Argo CD

entry.summary: Build Amazon EKS with Envoy Gateway deployed using Argo CD

entry.title: Bootstrap EKS Auto Mode Cluster with ACK and kro using Kind

link.title: Bootstrap EKS Auto Mode Cluster with ACK and kro using Kind

entry.summary: Use a Kind cluster with AWS Controllers for Kubernetes (ACK) and Kubernetes Resource Orchestrator (kro) to bootstrap a self-managed EKS cluster
